name: UpdateDeprecatedAPI
modelDescription: Looks up deprecated Lens Studio APIs and provides modern replacements with migration examples. Use when encountering deprecated code or modernizing projects. Covers 351 deprecated APIs across 5 categories (classes, methods, properties, events, enums).

apiName.modelDescription: The deprecated API name to look up. Accepts class names (e.g., 'Animation'), function names (e.g., 'getFacesCount'), properties (e.g., 'speedRatio'), or qualified names (e.g., 'AnimationMixer.speedRatio'). Partial matching supported.

category.modelDescription: Optional: Filter by API type category to narrow results.

includeExamples.modelDescription: Include code examples showing before/after migration. Default: true

searchMode.modelDescription: Search strategy: 'exact' (exact name), 'partial' (substring), 'category' (all in category). Default: 'partial'
